text.div:
AIR indication code

https://nzhts.digital.health.nz/fhir/ValueSet/air-indication-code

Coded values to describe the reason an immunisation was given. Initially drawn from legacy NIR codes and CIR SNOMED codes.

name: AIRIndicationCode
title: AIR indication code
description: Coded values to describe the reason an immunisation was given. Initially drawn from legacy NIR codes and CIR SNOMED codes.

concept.display: Publicly funded vaccination given for 65 years of age or older
Publicly funded vaccination given due to medical condition included in criteria list
Publicly funded vaccination given due to pregnancy
Publicly funded vaccination given for child four years of age or under due to history of hospitalization with respiratory condition
Publicly funded vaccination given to Māori and Pacific people aged 55 to 64 years of age
Vaccine product against Severe acute respiratory syndrom coronavirus 2 given
Publicly funded vaccination given for child three to twelve years of age
Publicly funded vaccination given for serious mental health and addiction
Publicly funded vaccination given for child six months to twelve years of age
At risk for pneumococcal, no previous history
At risk for pneumococcal, previous conjugate/PCV7 history
At risk for pneumococcal, previous polysaccharide/23PPV history
Pneumococcal vaccine given on catch-up schedule
Pre-primary course (vaccines required before any primary course)
HepB high risk - booster or extra dose
